faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in South Ozone Park?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in South Ozone Park typically ranges from $350 to $2,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, colony locations, and the size of your property. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my South Ozone Park home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include piles of sawdust-like wood shavings near baseboards or windowsills, rustling sounds in walls, and sightings of large black ants (especially winged ones) during spring. Carpenter ants are particularly active in South Ozone Park homes with moisture issues or wood-to-soil contact.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to carpenter ant problems in South Ozone Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for South Ozone Park residents in most cases. Carpenter ant infestations require prompt attention to prevent structural damage, so we prioritize quick response times throughout Queens.

faqs.question: Will carpenter ant treatment be safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for your family and pets when used as directed. Our technicians will provide specific instructions for any temporary precautions needed during treatment, and we offer eco-friendly options upon request.
